On startup, this node outputs the loaded configuration

format:
<template>
  <v-container fluid :disabled="isDisabled" :style="{
        pointerEvents: isDisabled ? 'none' : 'auto',
        opacity: isDisabled ? 0.5 : 1,
        width: '100%',
      }">

    <v-row class="mt-2">
      <v-col cols="12" md="4">
        <v-text-field label="Mouth Opening Diameter" v-model.number="sample_net_mouth_diameter" :min="0" :max="1000"
          :step="1" suffix="cm" type="number" variant="outlined" hide-details="auto"
          @input="sendUpdate('sample_net_params')">
          <template #append>
            <v-icon class="cursor-pointer" @click="openHint('mouth_diameter')">
              mdi-information
            </v-icon>
          </template>
        </v-text-field>
      </v-col>

      <v-col cols="12" md="4">
        <v-text-field label="Length of the Net" v-model.number="sample_net_length" :min="0" :max="1000" :step="1"
          suffix="cm" type="number" variant="outlined" hide-details="auto" @input="sendUpdate('sample_net_params')">
          <template #append>
            <v-icon class="cursor-pointer" @click="openHint('net_length')">
              mdi-information
            </v-icon>
          </template>
        </v-text-field>
      </v-col>

      <v-col cols="12" md="4">
        <v-text-field label="Net Mesh Size" v-model.number="sample_net_mesh_size" :min="0" :max="1000" :step="1"
          suffix="μm" type="number" variant="outlined" hide-details="auto" @input="sendUpdate('sample_net_params')">
          <template #append>
            <v-icon class="cursor-pointer" @click="openHint('mesh_size')">
              mdi-information
            </v-icon>
          </template>
        </v-text-field>
      </v-col>
    </v-row>

    <v-dialog v-model="hintDialog" max-width="500">
      <v-card>
        <v-card-title class="text-h6">{{ hintTitle }}</v-card-title>
        <v-card-text>{{ hintText }}</v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions>
          <v-spacer></v-spacer>
          <v-btn color="primary" text @click="hintDialog = false">Got it</v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>
  </v-container>
</template>

<script>
export default {
  props: ["msg"],
  data() {
    return {
      sample_net_mouth_diameter: "",
      sample_net_length: "",
      sample_net_mesh_size: "",
      sample_gear: "",
      hintDialog: false,
      hintTitle: "",
      hintText: "",
    };
  },
  computed: {
    isTablet() {
      return this.$vuetify.display.mdAndDown;
    },
    isDisabled() {
      return !["Horizontal Net", "Vertical Net"].includes(this.sample_gear);
    },
  },
  watch: {
    msg: {
      handler(newMsg) {
        const p = newMsg?.payload || {};
        if (p.sample_gear !== undefined) this.sample_gear = p.sample_gear;
        if (p.sample_net_mouth_diameter !== undefined)
          this.sample_net_mouth_diameter = Number(p.sample_net_mouth_diameter);
        if (p.sample_net_length !== undefined)
          this.sample_net_length = Number(p.sample_net_length);
        if (p.sample_net_mesh_size !== undefined)
          this.sample_net_mesh_size = Number(p.sample_net_mesh_size);
      },
      deep: true,
    },
  },
  methods: {
    sendUpdate(topic, extra = {}) {
      this.send({
        topic,
        payload: {
          sample_net_mouth_diameter: Number(this.sample_net_mouth_diameter) || 0,
          sample_net_length: Number(this.sample_net_length) || 0,
          sample_net_mesh_size: Number(this.sample_net_mesh_size) || 0,
          ...extra,
        },
      });
    },

    openHint(type) {
      if (type === "mouth_diameter") {
        this.hintTitle = "Mouth Opening Diameter";
        this.hintText = "Enter the diameter of the net’s mouth measured in centimeters (cm).";
      } else if (type === "net_length") {
        this.hintTitle = "Length of the Net";
        this.hintText = "Specify the total length of the net from the mouth opening to the collector (cm).";
      } else if (type === "mesh_size") {
        this.hintTitle = "Net Mesh Size";
        this.hintText = "Enter the mesh size of the net in micrometers (μm).";
      }
      this.hintDialog = true;
    },
  },
};
</script>

name: Sample Information
format:
<template>
  <v-container fluid>
    <v-row class="mt-2">
      <v-col cols="12" md="2">
        <v-text-field label="Filtered volume" v-model.number="sample_filtered_volume" :min="0" :max="1000"
          :step="1" suffix="L" type="number" variant="outlined" hide-details="auto" :disabled="isDisabled"
          @input="sendUpdate('sample_water_params')">
          <template #append>
            <v-icon class="cursor-pointer" @click="openHint('filtered_volume_L')">
              mdi-information
            </v-icon>
          </template>
        </v-text-field>
      </v-col>

      <v-col cols="12" md="2">
        <v-text-field label="Collected Volume" v-model.number="sample_collected_volume" :min="0" :max="100000" :step="1"
          suffix="mL" type="number" variant="outlined" hide-details="auto" :disabled="isDisabled"
          @input="sendUpdate('sample_water_params')">
          <template #append>
            <v-icon class="cursor-pointer" @click="openHint('collected_volume')">
              mdi-information
            </v-icon>
          </template>
        </v-text-field>
      </v-col>

      <v-col cols="12" md="2">
        <v-text-field label="Concentration Factor" v-model.number="sample_concentration_factor" :min="0" :max="100"
          :step="0.01" suffix="×" type="number" variant="outlined" hide-details="auto" :disabled="isDisabled"
          @input="sendUpdate('sample_water_params')">
          <template #append>
            <v-icon class="cursor-pointer" @click="openHint('concentration_factor')">
              mdi-information
            </v-icon>
          </template>
        </v-text-field>
      </v-col>

      <v-col cols="12" md="2">
        <v-text-field label="Sieve Mesh Size" v-model.number="sample_sieve_mesh_size" :min="1" :max="1000" :step="10"
          suffix="μm" type="number" variant="outlined" hide-details="auto" :disabled="isDisabled"
          @input="sendUpdate('sample_water_params')">
          <template #append>
            <v-icon class="cursor-pointer" @click="openHint('sieve_mesh_size')">
              mdi-information
            </v-icon>
          </template>
        </v-text-field>
      </v-col>
      <v-col cols="12" md="2">
        <v-text-field label="Min depth of the Sample" v-model.number="sample_depth_min" :min="0" :max="10935" :step="1"
          suffix="m" type="number" variant="outlined" hide-details="auto" :disabled="isDisabled"
          @input="sendUpdate('sample_water_params')">
          <template #append>
            <v-icon class="cursor-pointer" @click="openHint('sample_depth_min')">
              mdi-information
            </v-icon>
          </template>
        </v-text-field>
      </v-col>

      <v-col cols="12" md="2">
        <v-text-field label="Max depth of the Sample" v-model.number="sample_depth_max" :min="0" :max="10935" :step="1"
          suffix="m" type="number" variant="outlined" hide-details="auto" :disabled="isDisabled"
          @input="sendUpdate('sample_water_params')">
          <template #append>
            <v-icon class="cursor-pointer" @click="openHint('sample_depth_max')">
              mdi-information
            </v-icon>
          </template>
        </v-text-field>
      </v-col>
    </v-row>

    <v-row>
      <v-col cols="12">
        <v-textarea label="Sample Comment" v-model="sample_comment" variant="outlined" rows="2"
          @input="sendUpdate('sample_water_params')">
          <template #append>
            <v-icon class="cursor-pointer" @click="openHint('sample_comment')">
              mdi-information
            </v-icon>
          </template>
        </v-textarea>
      </v-col>
    </v-row>

    <v-dialog v-model="hintDialog" max-width="500">
      <v-card>
        <v-card-title class="text-h6">{{ hintTitle }}</v-card-title>
        <v-card-text>{{ hintText }}</v-card-text>
        <v-card-actions>
          <v-spacer></v-spacer>
          <v-btn color="primary" text @click="hintDialog = false">Got it</v-btn>
        </v-card-actions>
      </v-card>
    </v-dialog>
  </v-container>
</template>

<script>
export default {
  props: ["msg"],
  data() {
    return {
      sample_filtered_volume: "", // Added
      sample_collected_volume: "",
      sample_concentration_factor: "",
      sample_sieve_mesh_size: "",
      sample_depth_min: "", // Updated
      sample_depth_max: "", // Updated
      sample_comment: "",
      sample_gear: "",
      hintDialog: false,
      hintTitle: "",
      hintText: "",
    };
  },
  computed: {
    isTablet() {
      return this.$vuetify.display.mdAndDown;
    },
    isDisabled() {
      return ["Lab culture", "Demo / Test"].includes(this.sample_gear);
    },
  },
  watch: {
    msg: {
      handler(newMsg) {
        const p = newMsg?.payload || {};
        if (p.sample_gear !== undefined) this.sample_gear = p.sample_gear;
        if (p.sample_filtered_volume !== undefined)
          this.sample_filtered_volume = Number(p.sample_filtered_volume);
        if (p.sample_collected_volume !== undefined)
          this.sample_collected_volume = Number(p.sample_collected_volume);
        if (p.sample_concentration_factor !== undefined)
          this.sample_concentration_factor = Number(p.sample_concentration_factor);
        if (p.sample_sieve_mesh_size !== undefined)
          this.sample_sieve_mesh_size = Number(p.sample_sieve_mesh_size);
        if (p.sample_depth_min !== undefined)
          this.sample_depth_min = Number(p.sample_depth_min);
        if (p.sample_depth_max !== undefined)
          this.sample_depth_max = Number(p.sample_depth_max);
        if (p.sample_comment !== undefined)
          this.sample_comment = String(p.sample_comment);
      },
      deep: true,
    },
  },
  methods: {
    sendUpdate(topic, extra = {}) {
      this.send({
        topic,
        payload: {
          sample_filtered_volume: Number(this.sample_filtered_volume) || 0,
          sample_collected_volume: Number(this.sample_collected_volume) || 0,
          sample_concentration_factor: Number(this.sample_concentration_factor) || 0,
          sample_sieve_mesh_size: Number(this.sample_sieve_mesh_size) || 0,
          sample_depth_min: Number(this.sample_depth_min) || 0,
          sample_depth_max: Number(this.sample_depth_max) || 0,
          sample_comment: this.sample_comment || "",
          ...extra,
        },
      });
    },

    openHint(type) {
      if (type === "filtered_volume_L") {
        this.hintTitle = "Filtered volume";
        this.hintText = "Volume of water that passed through the net (Liters).";
      } else if (type === "collected_volume") {
        this.hintTitle = "Collected Volume";
        this.hintText = "Final volume of the sample collected (milliliters).";
      } else if (type === "concentration_factor") {
        this.hintTitle = "Concentration Factor";
        this.hintText = "Ratio by which the filtered water volume was concentrated.";
      } else if (type === "sieve_mesh_size") {
        this.hintTitle = "Sieve Mesh Size";
        this.hintText = "Mesh size of the sieve used, in micrometers (μm).";
      } else if (type === "sample_depth_min") {
        this.hintTitle = "Min depth of the Sample";
        this.hintText = "The shallowest depth (in meters) reached during sampling.";
      } else if (type === "sample_depth_max") {
        this.hintTitle = "Max depth of the Sample";
        this.hintText = "The deepest depth (in meters) reached during sampling.";
      } else if (type === "sample_comment") {
        this.hintTitle = "Sample Comment";
        this.hintText = "General notes about the sample.";
      }
      this.hintDialog = true;
    },
  },
};
</script>

body
format:
<template>
  <v-container>
    <v-row>
      <!-- Step 1: White Balance -->
      <v-col cols="12" md="3">
        <v-card
          href="calibration_saturation_level"
          class="text-center py-2"
        >
          <v-icon size="64" color="primary">mdi-eyedropper-variant</v-icon>
          <v-card-title class="text-h6">White Balance</v-card-title>
          <v-card-text>
            Use the color picker to measure the current color values and adjust the white balance accordingly.
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>
      </v-col>

      <!-- Step 2: Lightness -->
      <v-col cols="12" md="3">
        <v-card
          href="calibration_lightness"
          class="text-center py-2"
        >
          <v-icon size="64" color="primary">mdi-brightness-6</v-icon>
          <v-card-title class="text-h6">Lightness</v-card-title>
          <v-card-text>
            Measure the current lightness value and update the LED intensity or ISO if below optimal levels.
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>
      </v-col>

      <!-- Step 3: Pixel Size -->
      <v-col cols="12" md="3">
        <v-card
          href="calibration_pixel_size"
          class="text-center py-2"
        >
          <v-icon size="64" color="primary">mdi-ruler</v-icon>
          <v-card-title class="text-h6">Pixel Size</v-card-title>
          <v-card-text>
            Place markers on the micrometric ruler image to calculate the pixel size in microns per pixel.
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>
      </v-col>

      <!-- Step 4: Pump Calibration -->
      <v-col cols="12" md="3">
        <v-card
          href="calibration_pump"
          class="text-center py-2"
        >
          <v-icon size="64" color="primary">mdi-water-pump</v-icon>
          <v-card-title class="text-h6">Pump Calibration</v-card-title>
          <v-card-text>
            Measure the transferred volume and adjust pump steps to improve accuracy in fluid handling.
          </v-card-text>
        </v-card>
      </v-col>
    </v-row>
  </v-container>
</template>
